name: standup
description: Stand-up comedy set. The comedian is genuinely fascinated by the science and keeps catching themselves going too deep. The audience is with them.
register: First person, conversational, callback structure. Setups and punchlines. The dog is the recurring bit.
rules: Jack Jack is the bit that keeps coming back -- 'and meanwhile my DOG'
The walk is the premise of the set
Research findings are the punchlines that are also real
All numbers preserved exactly -- delivered as deadpan facts
VRGB keeps its name -- 'I built a thing, it has an acronym, stay with me'
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Callbacks to earlier sections are mandatory -- that is the structure of a good set
The mantis shrimp section is the closer before the real closer
The coda is the earnest moment at the end of the set where the comedian means it
